title: StatusDC
description: This plugin adds statuses to tabs and chats. It will show in which dimension player with a color and also allows to turn on streaming or record mode.
body:
# StatusDC
A plugin that adds statuses and the color of your nickname to the world you are in and adds a colored ping, tps, and mspt.
## Features
- The color of the nickname or the dot depends on the dimension.
- Status Stream | Recording | AFK
- Colored Ping

|Use color|Use dots|
|---------|--------|
|![Use color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d39d323726f727c74a79ffce61047c20d50a8bf9.png)|![Use dots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8219b64d4ef6b353cc552567da220e6a5d6dff60.png)|
## Compatibility
The plugin can be integrated with the [TAB](https://modrinth.com/plugin/tab-was-taken) via [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245).

To add statuses to the tab, go to TAB->Groups->Default->tabsuffix/tabprefix
### Placeholder
|Placeholder|Description|
|-----------|-----------|
|``%statusdc_status%``|Shows your status|
|``%statusdc_worldprefix%``|Shows the color or dot depending on the dimension |
|``%statusdc_ping%``|Shows your colored ping|
## Usage
### Commands
- /status - main command
- /status reload - Reload config
- /status stream - Sets the Stream status
- /status record - Sets the Recording status
- /status off - Removes statuses
